2606.10400.title: Do Vision-Language Models See or Guess? Measuring and Reducing Textual-Prior Reliance with a Phrasing-Controlled Benchmark
2606.10400.paper_summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed where answers must follow from what is in the image, yet they often answer from textual priors, the question's phrasing together with memorized world knowledge, rather than from the image itself, which inflates benchmark scores and yields confident but ungrounded answers. Existing benchmarks rarely isolate this behavior, since each image is usually paired with a single fixed question. To measure the reliance, we build a 540-image benchmark across six reasoning categories and generate four question variants over the same images, so that phrasing rather than image content is the controlled variable. The hardest variant is written directly from the image to minimize text leakage. We benchmark eleven VLMs spanning small open-weight models to large closed-source systems: every model degrades on the hardest variant, and open models fall furthest. Our central diagnostic is a no-image ablation, which collapses the open-weight models to their text-only floor (1 to 9 percent). Three further analyses, LLM-rated difficulty, low base-to-final textual similarity, and human re-annotation, corroborate genuine image-dependence. In-context exemplars that match how a variant was built recover the most accuracy, and GRPO post-training of a small VLM yields consistent gains across all four variants that transfer to a held-out out-of-distribution set. Textual-prior reliance is measurable and partly trainable away.
2606.10400.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）越來越多地被應用於需要根據圖像內容給出答案的情境，但它們經常根據文本先驗、問題的措辭以及記憶中的世界知識來回答，而不是直接從圖像本身回答，這導致基準分數膨脹並產生自信但缺乏根據的答案。現有的基準很少單獨隔離這種行為，因為每個圖像通常只與一個固定問題配對。為了測量這種依賴性，我們建立了一個涵蓋六個推理類別的540幅圖像基準，並針對相同圖像生成四個問題變體，以便措辭而非圖像內容成為受控變數。最難的變體是直接從圖像撰寫，以最小化文本泄漏。我們對十一個VLM進行基準測試，涵蓋從小型開放權重模型到大型封閉源系統：每個模型在最難的變體上都有所下降，而開放模型的下降最為明顯。我們的主要診斷是一個無圖像消融，這使得開放權重模型的表現降至其僅基於文本的底線（1%到9%）。三項進一步分析，即LLM評估的難度、低基準到最終文本相似度，以及人類重新標註，證實了真正的圖像依賴性。與變體構建方式匹配的上下文示例能夠恢復最高的準確性，而小型VLM的GRPO後訓練在所有四個變體上都帶來了一致的增益，這些增益轉移到一個保留的分佈外數據集上。文本先驗的依賴性是可測量的，並且部分可以通過訓練消除。
2606.10400.author: Pratham Singla et.al.
2606.10400.authors: Pratham Singla, Shivank Garg, Vihan Singh, Paras Chopra
